sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75914" key="ou)ragwgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐρᾰγωγός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὖρον</foreign> (A), <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄγω</foreign>) <sense id="n75914.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">promoting urine</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πότισμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.71</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
